name: Schematic Narratives — Event Structure fMRI
description: OpenNeuro dataset (ds001510) using audiovisual and audio narratives that share underlying event schemas. Used to study how the brain represents abstract event structure and social scripts across different stories.
citation: Baldassano C, et al. (2018). Representation of real-world event schemas during narrative perception. Journal of Neuroscience, 38(45), 9689–9699.
